languages.text: "Уж теперь-то, с вашим попечением, грех не работать в два... нет, в три раза шибче!"

traits.locale_text: "Уж теперь-то, с вашим попечением, грех не работать в два... нет, в три раза шибче!"

languages.text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"
languages.original_text: "Уж теперь-то, с вашим попечением, грех не работать в два... нет, в три раза шибче!"

traits.locale_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"
"Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"
"Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

languages.text: 「今、君が僕らを世話してくれるなら、2倍、いや3倍の速さで働かないのは間違っている！」
languages.original_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

languages.text: "Şimdi siz bize bakarken iki kat... Hayır, üç kat daha hızlı çalışmamak olmaz!"
languages.original_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi siz bize bakarken iki kat... Hayır, üç kat daha hızlı çalışmamak olmaz!"

languages.text: “如今有您的关照，干活儿要是不拼上两倍——不，三倍的力气，那都叫没良心！”
languages.original_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

traits.locale_text: “如今有您的关照，干活儿要是不拼上两倍——不，三倍的力气，那都叫没良心！”

languages.text: "Nachdem Ihr jetzt für uns sorgt, wäre es falsch, nicht doppelt so schnell zu arbeiten ... nein, dreimal so schnell!"
languages.original_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

traits.locale_text: "Nachdem Ihr jetzt für uns sorgt, wäre es falsch, nicht doppelt so schnell zu arbeiten ... nein, dreimal so schnell!"

languages.text: « Maintenant que vous prenez soin de nous, nous serions bien ingrats de ne pas travailler deux fois… non, trois fois plus vite ! »
languages.original_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

traits.locale_text: « Maintenant que vous prenez soin de nous, nous serions bien ingrats de ne pas travailler deux fois… non, trois fois plus vite ! »

languages.text: «Ahora que cuida de nosotros, lo justo sería redoblar nuestros esfuerzos. ¡No, triplicarlos!».
languages.original_text: "Now, with you taking care of us, it'd be wrong not to work twice— no, three times as fast!"

traits.locale_text: «Ahora que cuida de nosotros, lo justo sería redoblar nuestros esfuerzos. ¡No, triplicarlos!».
